'''鈭歞h-zh-r''' ('''kadhazhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:policy|policy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:policy|policy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazhar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazhar|thidhazhar]] || [[word:jidhazhar|jidhazhar]] || [[word:shidhazhar|shidhazhar]] || [[word:kidhazhar|kidhazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhazhar|thuthudhazhar]] || [[word:jujudhazhar|jujudhazhar]] || [[word:shushudhazhar|shushudhazhar]] || [[word:kukudhazhar|kukudhazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhazhar|thudhazhar]] || [[word:judhazhar|judhazhar]] || [[word:shudhazhar|shudhazhar]] || [[word:kudhazhar|kudhazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhazhar|thudhazhar]] || [[word:judhazhar|judhazhar]] || [[word:shudhazhar|shudhazhar]] || [[word:kudhazhar|kudhazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhazhar|thedhazhar]] || [[word:jedhazhar|jedhazhar]] || [[word:shedhazhar|shedhazhar]] || [[word:kedhazhar|kedhazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhazhar|thothodhazhar]] || [[word:jojodhazhar|jojodhazhar]] || [[word:shoshodhazhar|shoshodhazhar]] || [[word:kokodhazhar|kokodhazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazhar|thodhazhar]] || [[word:jodhazhar|jodhazhar]] || [[word:shodhazhar|shodhazhar]] || [[word:kodhazhar|kodhazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazhar|thodhazhar]] || [[word:jodhazhar|jodhazhar]] || [[word:shodhazhar|shodhazhar]] || [[word:kodhazhar|kodhazhar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]] || [[word:dhazhar|dhazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhazhar|th忙dhazhar]] || [[word:j忙dhazhar|j忙dhazhar]] || [[word:sh忙dhazhar|sh忙dhazhar]] || [[word:k忙dhazhar|k忙dhazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhazhar|thathadhazhar]] || [[word:jajadhazhar|jajadhazhar]] || [[word:shashadhazhar|shashadhazhar]] || [[word:kakadhazhar|kakadhazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhazhar|thadhazhar]] || [[word:jadhazhar|jadhazhar]] || [[word:shadhazhar|shadhazhar]] || [[word:kadhazhar|kadhazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhazhar|thadhazhar]] || [[word:jadhazhar|jadhazhar]] || [[word:shadhazhar|shadhazhar]] || [[word:kadhazhar|kadhazhar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhazhar|shadhazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhazhar|goshadhazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhazhar|gokishadhazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhazharn眉|shadhazharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkn眉|goshadhazharnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazharn眉|gokishadhazharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhazharsh毛|shadhazharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhazharnksh毛|goshadhazharnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhazharsh毛|gokishadhazharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazharro|shadhazharro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkro|goshadhazharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazharro|gokishadhazharro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazharmu|shadhazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkmu|goshadhazharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazharmu|gokishadhazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhazharsher|shadhazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhazharnksher|goshadhazharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhazharsher|gokishadhazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhazharng|shadhazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkng|goshadhazharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhazharng|gokishadhazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhazharya|shadhazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkya|goshadhazharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhazharya|gokishadhazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhazharyam|shadhazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkyam|goshadhazharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhazharyam|gokishadhazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazharn眉sh毛|shadhazharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkn眉sh毛|goshadhazharnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazharn眉sh毛|gokishadhazharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazharn眉ro|shadhazharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkn眉ro|goshadhazharnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazharn眉ro|gokishadhazharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazharn眉mu|shadhazharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkn眉mu|goshadhazharnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazharn眉mu|gokishadhazharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazharsh毛n眉|shadhazharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazharnksh毛n眉|goshadhazharnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazharsh毛n眉|gokishadhazharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazharsh毛ro|shadhazharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazharnksh毛ro|goshadhazharnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazharsh毛ro|gokishadhazharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazharsh毛mu|shadhazharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazharnksh毛mu|goshadhazharnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazharsh毛mu|gokishadhazharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazharron眉|shadhazharron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkron眉|goshadhazharnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazharron眉|gokishadhazharron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazharrosh毛|shadhazharrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkrosh毛|goshadhazharnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazharrosh毛|gokishadhazharrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhazharromu|shadhazharromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkromu|goshadhazharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhazharromu|gokishadhazharromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhazharmun眉|shadhazharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkmun眉|goshadhazharnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhazharmun眉|gokishadhazharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhazharmush毛|shadhazharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkmush毛|goshadhazharnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhazharmush毛|gokishadhazharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhazharmuro|shadhazharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhazharnkmuro|goshadhazharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhazharmuro|gokishadhazharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
